svg.title: Bedroom three memory fragment (apartment three) - multiple periods of life softly overlapping
svg.desc: A warm tea-stained room caught between several time periods at once. A low walnut dresser carries a wind-up alarm clock from one decade, a stack of vinyl, a cassette, a CD, a smartphone with a glowing screen from another, and a small wooden rocking-horse toy from another still. A soft amber lamp pools light over them. A small framed mirror on the wall holds a silhouette that lags slightly behind. To the left, a window cropped at the edge looks out onto a season that quietly cycles. To the right, the corner of a bed holds a patchwork quilt sewn from several different eras. Stacked cardboard boxes lean nearby. A faint ghost outline on the wall remembers a piece of furniture that no longer lives here. The whole scene is washed warm but distant, like a memory growing softer as several lifetimes settle on top of each other.
